summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact marks this as a mixed PR shard, not a dedupe cluster, with no shared canonical and no allowed merge/fix/raise_pr actions. No security-sensitive items were flagged by the preflight security boundary summary. Hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review/proof/author follow-up as applicable; the already-closed PR is kept closed; refs missing from the hydrated artifact are non-mutating needs_human items because target_updated_at is unavailable.
